# greenmeans.ovh

## Home

[GreenMeans - Green Policy Made Accessible](https://greenmeans.ovh/): 
[GreenMeans: Search, Your Eco-Friendly Search Aggregator](https://search.greenmeans.ovh/): Discover a Greener way to search. GreenMeans lets you choose your favorite search engine whilst being eco-friendly and privacy-focused.
[GreenMeans - Privacy Policy](https://privacy.greenmeans.ovh/): Privacy Policy for GreenMeans. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring transparency about how we handle your data.
[GreenMeans - Toolkit](https://toolkit.greenmeans.ovh/): A modern guide to Non-Violent Communication (NVC) for transforming conflict into community.
